title: nie-bot: E2E self-test mode (--self-test)
description:
What: --self-test flag: bot sends a whisper to itself and verifies delivery within 10s.

Algorithm:
1. In bot/src/main.rs, after relay auth confirmed (first DIRECTORY_LIST received):
   a. if config.self_test:
      - send WhisperParams { to: my_pub_id.0.clone(), payload: serde_json::to_vec(ClearMessage::Chat{text:"__self_test__"})? }
      - start tokio::time::timeout(Duration::from_secs(10), ...)
      - inside timeout loop: wait for ClientEvent::Message with method=whisper_deliver
        - deserialize WhisperDeliverParams; check payload deserializes to ClearMessage::Chat{text:"__self_test__"}
        - if match: println!("PASS"); std::process::exit(0)
      - timeout fires: eprintln!("FAIL: self-test timed out after 10s"); std::process::exit(1)
2. In relay/tests/ or a new integration test: nie-bot --self-test connects to a real relay, passes within 5s
   - Test starts relay in background, runs nie-bot --self-test, asserts exit 0

Defensive:
- __self_test__ sentinel is matched by exact content, not prefix
- Timeout ensures test mode never hangs in CI
- Exit codes: 0=PASS, 1=FAIL/timeout — allows use in CI scripts

Agent team: R (researcher: check relay test infra in relay/tests/), I (implementer), V (validator: run self-test against local relay).
Tests: integration test using spawned relay process asserts exit 0 within 8s
acceptance_criteria: nie-bot --self-test exits 0 against a local relay; exits 1 if relay unreachable; integration test in test suite passes
